raw_text:
Principal Full Stack Engineer

Prism Systems — Building real-time data platforms that power enterprise intelligence

Location

San Francisco, CA (Remote-Flexible)

Employment Type

Full-time

Compensation

$280,000 - $380,000 base + equity + bonus

The Opportunity

Prism Systems is seeking an experienced Principal Full Stack Engineer to lead technical strategy

across our core platform. You'll architect foundational systems serving millions of transactions, mentor

staff and senior engineers, and drive org-wide technical decisions affecting 50+ engineers. This is a

hands-on principal role where you'll spend 40% on strategic leadership and 60% building critical

systems.

About Prism Systems

Prism Systems is a Series C fintech and data infrastructure company founded in 2018. We build

modern, scalable data pipelines and real-time analytics platforms for enterprises. Our platform
processes over 500 billion events daily and serves customers in financial services, e-commerce, and
SaaS. We have 150 engineers across three global offices and are backed by tier-one VCs.

Day-to-Day

Define and evolve the technical architecture of our real-time event processing platform, ensuring
scalability, reliability, and security across 50+ microservices

Lead cross-functional technical initiatives spanning frontend (React), backend (Node.js/TypeScript),
and infrastructure (AWS/GCP), unblocking 3-4 teams simultaneously

Mentor 4-6 senior and staff engineers, conducting architecture reviews, code reviews, and career
development conversations

Drive strategic decisions on technology choices, migration paths, and foundational system

investments with 2-3 year business impact

Own the design and implementation of critical services (GraphQL API layer, data ingestion pipeline,
real-time streaming framework) ensuring sub-100ms latencies

Establish technical standards, best practices, and development workflows for PostgreSQL query
optimization and distributed system patterns

Collaborate with VPs of Engineering and Product to translate business requirements into technical
roadmaps and communicate technical risks to leadership

Champion observability, testability, and production excellence; own or co-own SLA metrics for core
platform components

Represent Prism Systems in external forums (conferences, open-source projects) and contribute to
internal knowledge-sharing via architecture RFCs

 You Have

12+ years of software engineering experience with 4+ years in principal, staff, or technical lead

roles at scale

Demonstrated expertise in full-stack development: Node.js/TypeScript backend and React frontend

in production systems

Deep proficiency with PostgreSQL (query optimization, indexing, replication) and REST/GraphQL

API design patterns

Strong experience architecting systems on AWS or GCP, including containerization (Docker),

orchestration (Kubernetes), and serverless patterns

Proven ability to define technical strategy, influence large organizations (50+ engineers), and

mentor senior-level engineers

Track record of shipping high-impact, low-latency systems handling millions of requests or events

at scale

Bonus

Experience building real-time data pipelines or event streaming systems (Kafka, message queues,

or stream processors)

Contributions to open-source projects or experience designing public APIs and SDKs

Background in financial services, data infrastructure, or high-frequency systems

Familiarity with infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, CloudFormation) and CI/CD best practices
(GitHub Actions, ArgoCD)

Our Stack

Node.js   TypeScript   React   PostgreSQL   GraphQL   REST APIs   AWS (EC2, RDS, Lambda, S3)

Docker & Kubernetes   GCP (Firestore, Pub/Sub)   Redis & Message Queues

What We Offer

Competitive equity package (0.5–2% depending on level) with 4-year vesting

Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage (100% employer-paid for employees, 75% for
dependents)

Unlimited PTO + 15 company holidays + sabbatical program (3 weeks paid after 5 years)

Remote-first culture with flexible work arrangements; quarterly in-person sync in SF

Professional development budget: $5,000/year for conferences, courses, or training

Parental leave (20 weeks paid for primary caregiver, 12 weeks for secondary)

401(k) matching up to 6% + financial planning consultation

Free lunch stipend ($20/day) and wellness allowance ($250/month for gym or wellness services)

Apply

Apply via our careers portal at www.prismsystems.io/careers with your resume, LinkedIn profile, and a
brief note on why you're interested in this role. We also welcome referrals from current Prism

 employees—send referrals to careers@prismsystems.io. First-round interviews are typically 45-

minute technical conversations with our VP of Engineering.
nice_to_have: Experience building real-time data pipelines or event streaming systems (Kafka, message queues,
Contributions to open-source projects or experience designing public APIs and SDKs
Background in financial services, data infrastructure, or high-frequency systems
Familiarity with infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, CloudFormation) and CI/CD best practices
